reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Dr. Aletaha and her team are amazing! They made me feel comfortable and explained everything thoroughly. My teeth have never looked better. The office is modern and clean, and the staff is incredibly friendly.

reviews.name: James T.
reviews.text: I had a dental emergency and they got me in right away. Dr. Houshmand was gentle and professional. The pain relief was immediate, and they worked with my insurance to make it affordable. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Meghan R.
reviews.text: Beautiful office and kind staff. I felt heard the entire time. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: Finally found a dentist I actually look forward to visiting. The team here treats you like family. My Invisalign treatment has been going incredibly smoothly — Dr. Aletaha walks me through every step.

reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: Brought my kids here for the first time and they actually LIKED the dentist! The hygienists are so patient and kind with children. We have found our family dental home.

reviews.name: Robert K.
reviews.text: Had a crown done here and the process was seamless. The digital impression technology means no messy molds. The crown fits perfectly and looks completely natural.
